ruleSearch.name: <js>var m=result.match(/<h5>.*?<a[^>]*>\d+\.\s*(.*?)<\/a>/); return m?m[1].trim():'';</js>
ruleSearch.author: <js>var m=result.match(/作者：<a[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/a>/); return m?m[1].trim():'';</js>
ruleSearch.kind: <js>var tags=[]; var re=/<a href="\/search\?q=[^"]*&f=tag"[^>]*>.*?#(.*?)<\/a>/g; var match; while((match=re.exec(result))!==null){tags.push(match[1].trim());} return tags.join(',');</js>

ruleBookInfo.name: <js>var m=result.match(/<h1>([^<]*)<\/h1>/); return m?m[1].trim():'';</js>
ruleBookInfo.author: <js>var m=result.match(/作者：<a[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/a>/); return m?m[1].trim():'';</js>
ruleBookInfo.kind: <js>var tags=[]; var re=/<a href="\/search\.html\?q=[^"]*&f=tag"[^>]*>.*?#(.*?)<\/a>/g; var match; while((match=re.exec(result))!==null){tags.push(match[1].trim());} return tags.join(',');</js>
ruleBookInfo.tocUrl: <js>var m=result.match(/<a href="([^"]*)"[^>]*>查看目录<\/a>/); return m?'https://www.alicesw.com'+m[1]:'';</js>
